ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game entity */,
  "version_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version group the entity belongs to */,
  "encounter_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method of encounter for the entity */,
  "slot" INTEGER /* Slot number where the entity can be found */,
  "rarity" INTEGER /* Rarity level of the entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the game entity */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., character, item, NPC) */,
  "entity_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the entity's image */,
  "entity_attributes" TEXT /* JSON object containing various attributes of the entity (e.g., health, attack, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_entities_rarity FOREIGN KEY ("rarity") REFERENCES rarity_levels ("rarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_entities_slot FOREIGN KEY ("slot") REFERENCES game_slots ("slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_entities_version_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_group_id") REFERENCES version_groups ("version_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_entities_encounter_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_method_id") REFERENCES encounter_methods ("encounter_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_groups" (
  "version_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version group */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or release notes for the version */,
  "is_current_version" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the current active version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounter_methods" (
  "encounter_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the encounter method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the encounter occurs */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of encounter method (e.g., random, quest, event) */,
  "method_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the method's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game slot */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the game slot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the slot */,
  "slot_type" TEXT /* Type of slot (e.g., outdoor, indoor) */,
  "slot_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the slot's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarity_levels" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity level */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity level */,
  "rarity_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the rarity level */,
  "rarity_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the rarity level's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "player_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "entities_encountered" INTEGER /* Total number of game entities encountered by the player */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score accumulated by the player */,
  "average_score" INTEGER /* Average score per game */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player */,
  "recent_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's most recent activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the role */,
  "role_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the role's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity version */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game entity */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the entity */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or release notes for the entity version */,
  "is_current_version" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the current active version of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_versions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES game_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_balancing" (
  "balancing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balancing change */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game entity affected */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the balancing change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., balance, bug fix) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., proposed, implemented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balancing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_balancing_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES game_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "entity_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first game entity */,
  "entity_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second game entity */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., battle, trade) */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Result of the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_interactions_entity_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id_1") REFERENCES game_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_interactions_entity_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id_2") REFERENCES game_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_entity_encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game entity */,
  "encounter_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encounter method */,
  "encounter_date" TEXT /* Date of the encounter */,
  "encounter_result" TEXT /* Result of the encounter (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_entity_encounters_encounter_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_method_id") REFERENCES encounter_methods ("encounter_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_entity_encounters_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES game_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_entity_encounters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
